title: InventoryGive
description: Allows OP players to manage other players inventories using /invgive, /invtake, /invswap and /invsee commands.
body:
# InventoryGive

A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that allows OP players to manage other players' inventories.

## Commands

- **/invgive <player>** — Copy your inventory to another player
- **/invtake <player>** — Take another player's inventory
- **/invswap <player>** — Swap inventories with another player
- **/invsee <player>** — Open and edit another player's inventory in a GUI

## Requirements

- All commands require OP (permission level 2)
- Fabric API required
